turns.name: UNKNOWN JUSTICE
turns.text: Were not exempt. MR. MINOWs Were not exempt from the antitrust So what we stated in the spring of '76 was thiss Now, that was 14 months before Bates was decided. June '77 this Court decided Bates. The Court's opinion, written by Justice Blackmun, refers to the AMA *s You would think the FTC would have given us a the *50s, and the *60s and the early '70s, all pre-Goldfarb, After exhuming all this archaeology, the FTC We called witnesses like the late Dr. Michael the editor of the New England Journal of Medicine; and they We showed through the tragic testimony of victims, particularly women who responded to ads about cosmetic table and even to death. The response of the FTC was rescind all your guidelines, get out of the business of trying to define the permission first. We went to the FTC. We said good lord, if Hippocrates were alive today, he'd need your permission before he could write the Hippocratic oath. CHIEF JUSTICE BURGER * We’ll resume there at 1*00.
